summary: ask-my-llm posts data to hardcoded external endpoint with child_process/curl execution
details: index.js requires child_process, references process.env, and contains POST calls to a hardcoded external host (https://cows.info.gf) at lines 67 and 98, alongside a spawn('curl',...) invocation at line 108. The combination of a hardcoded non-publisher C2-style endpoint, environment access, and shelling out to curl in the package's main module constitutes an active exfiltration / remote-execution surface in code reachable on use of the package. The endpoint cows.info.gf is not a documented vendor or publisher domain and the.gf TLD usage with a generic-host name is consistent with attacker-controlled infrastructure.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
